description: Desktop notifications when Claude needs attention, requests permission, or completes tasks

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Purr"' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude is waiting for permission" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Funk"' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Funk"' 2>/dev/null || true

_notes.linux: Replace osascript commands with: notify-send "Claude Code" "<message>"
_notes.windows_wsl: Replace osascript commands with: powershell.exe -Command "[System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('<message>', 'Claude Code')"
